name.description: Name of the prospect pool, unique within the organization (case-insensitive).

active.description: Whether the pool is currently in use. Inactive pools are hidden from CRM workflows but are retained so existing prospects remain queryable.

description.description: Free-text purpose statement set by the organization (max 500 characters). `null` when no description has been set.

department_ids.description: Ids of departments this pool is restricted to. Empty when the pool is not restricted by department; combined with `office_ids` and `job_ids`, an empty array on all three means the pool is unrestricted (available org-wide).

office_ids.description: Ids of offices this pool is restricted to. Empty when the pool is not restricted by office.

job_ids.description: Ids of jobs this pool is restricted to. Empty when the pool is not restricted by job.

description: Schema for the 'prospect_pools' stream, linked to the '/v3/prospect_pools' endpoint.
